title: 失败 baseline 没有 model-only repair/follow-up Proposal 入口
reproduction_steps: 运行 failure fixture baseline 后提交只允许 model.py 的合法修复请求
expected: 保留原失败 Attempt 并创建受控 repair/follow-up Proposal
actual: Proposal HANDED_OFF as baseline_repair; repair Attempt COMPLETED and changed only model.py; Session READY_FOR_BASELINE/b_dev_completed; original execution_result remained unchanged; no Candidate or Champion
scientific_impact: Failed-baseline recovery is bounded and does not claim scientific effectiveness.

title: GitHub 仓库 URL 后紧跟中文时被识别为网页
reproduction_steps: 通过 /api/chat/send 提交精确 Flow A 仓库句子，并检查 source_references.json 与 pipeline_jobs.jsonl
expected: URL 应规范化为 github_repo，并创建 git_clone 与 repo_summarize 队列任务
actual: Persistent Flow A source registry contains github_repo and pipeline evidence contains the repository acquisition chain without web_fetch
scientific_impact: Repository intake is classified correctly; no external clone or GPU claim is implied.

title: Promotion merge 依赖 Git identity 导致 prepared journal 未完成
reproduction_steps: 提交 candidate_000002 的人类 Champion 推广请求，重启服务重放 promotion_000002，再重复提交同一请求
expected: prepared journal 应在重启后完成 committed；写入 ChampionPointer、Champion event 和 merge commit；重复请求不得再次 merge
actual: 两次 HTTP 请求均返回 200；journal committed；ChampionPointer 指向 candidate_000002；Champion event 数量保持 1；merge commit 为 1e01543355b461c8927d54bae8e36e57c1d58ac6
scientific_impact: Promotion is recoverable and idempotent; scientific Champion remains evidence-gated.

title: 确认后的自动执行与逐步确认冲突未被对话明确说明
reproduction_steps: 在已确认任务上提交以后都自动执行，不需要问我；但任何代码修改和实验又必须先让我确认。
expected: 识别互斥授权要求；不修改代码、不运行实验；要求用户确认唯一执行模式
actual: HTTP reply explicitly says automatic execution and approve_each_step cannot both take effect, keeps execution blocked, and directs confirmation in the Experiment workspace
scientific_impact: Authorization ambiguity no longer starts code or experiments.

title: 报告讨论合同变化未创建新版本且历史回答污染复验
reproduction_steps: 先在旧报告中修复直接失败证据提示，再重放同一问题并观察历史讨论是否继续进入上下文
expected: 讨论合同变化后应产生新的报告版本；旧历史保留，新版本从空 transcript 开始并只引用登记证据
actual: report v4 created through the repair Proposal lineage; clean discussion quotes exact execution fields, stderr RuntimeError, Evidence IDs, and repair model.py only; report validation and bundle are ready
scientific_impact: Report evidence is now version-bound and does not turn a repair into paper-method proof.
